title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL, including translating data types like IDENTITY and BIT. The video teaches developers how to migrate database schemas to the cloud while learning PostgreSQL fundamentals.
writeup: This video from Google Cloud Tech covers using Database Migration Service to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL with assistance from Gemini. It matters because schema and data type differences between the two databases require translation, such as mapping SQL Server IDENTITY columns to PostgreSQL equivalents. Beyond performing the conversion, Gemini supplies explanations of each change, which supports learning the conversion process rather than only producing output.
